crime.value: Serial killer murders young blonde women, poses them with chess pieces, carves words into their forearms
crime.quote: Always beautiful. Posed as though they'd drifted off while reading, head gently restiing on an arm

victim.value: 19-year-old blonde woman found on Warren street with 'Perfidy' carved on her forearm, holding a Rook chess piece
victim.quote: Blonde ; always blonde. 19 years of age ; always so young, some poor bastards baby.

culprit_and_motive.value: Serial killer who judges victims based on perceived sins, using chess pieces as symbols and carving explanatory words
culprit_and_motive.quote: Normally one of the seven deadly sins, gluttony, sloth, envy.

investigator.value: Detective Kyler James Grimshaw, experienced but weakened investigator in hospital reviewing case files
investigator.quote: I roll over and lift the case file to read, my arms almost unable to lift it.

red_herring.value: Serial killer chess piece pattern appears to have no discernible system - some pieces repeat, others never appear
red_herring.quote: The pieces have no pattern. Some pieces show up more than one or twice, some not at all.

clue_fairness.value: Chess pieces and carved words presented directly to reader through case file examination
clue_fairness.quote: Chess piece ....... The Rook. [...] Bishop. [...] Perfidy.

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with aging detectives feeling inadequate against systematic killer
social_world.quote: How are two cops, too long in the tooth, going to stop him now?

reveal_mechanic.value: Chess piece symbolism combined with carved words on victims' forearms as killer's communication system
reveal_mechanic.quote: He always carves something into their forearms. [...] a word to explain why he took them.

investigator_wound.value: Aging detective physically failing while haunted by unsolved serial case and accumulated deaths
investigator_wound.quote: More ghosts than this old soul can grieve. [...] Has it gotten this heavy, a thousand clues that point to nothing.
